summary: SCD snapshot includes full DB schema and supports extra data tables from module compat patches

changes.description: The SCD DB snapshot exporter now includes CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS statements for all tables beyond the 6 core data tables. This gives CI builds a complete database schema so Magento CLI bootstraps correctly with install/date set.

Module compat patches can now declare snapshot_tables to request additional tables with data in the SCD snapshot. The build workflow collects these from all patches and passes them as extra_data_tables to the snapshot API. Tables are optional (skipped if missing) and validated for safe table names.
